caption: A dark, cinematic background serves as the setting for a digital title sequence. Centered in the upper half of the screen, the white text "BOSS TALK 101" is displayed in a bold, sans-serif font, with the word "PODCAST" appearing in smaller red letters directly underneath. A horizontal red light flare streaks across the text. Over the course of the sequence, the visual stability of the scene degrades. While the initial frames show the logo clearly against a dark, textured backdrop, a glitch effect begins to distort the image. By the end of the clip, the text "BOSS TALK 101" becomes blurred and fragmented with horizontal digital artifacts, while the red light flare extends further across the dark screen. No people, clothing, or physical equipment are visible.
